languages.text: "Ты ведь Кровавый Ангел. Почему ты служишь иному ордену?"
"You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"
languages.original_text: "Ты ведь Кровавый Ангел. Почему ты служишь иному ордену?"

traits.locale_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"
"You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"
"You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different order?"
"You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"
"You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

languages.text: 「あなたはブラッド・エンジェルか？なぜ別の秩序に仕えるのか？」
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different order?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたはブラッド・エンジェルですか？なぜ別の秩序に仕えるのですか？」

languages.text: «Es un Ángel Sangriento, ¿no? ¿Por qué sirve a otro capítulo?».
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

traits.locale_text: «Es un Ángel Sangriento, ¿no? ¿Por qué sirve a otro capítulo?».

languages.text: "Ihr seid ein Blood Angel, oder? Warum dient Ihr einem anderen Kapitel?"
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid ein Blood Angel, oder? Warum dient Ihr einem anderen Kapitel?"

languages.text: « Vous êtes un Blood Angel, n'est-ce pas ? Pourquoi servez-vous un autre chapitre ? »
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes un Blood Angel, n'est-ce pas ? Pourquoi servez-vous un autre chapitre ? »

languages.text: “你不是圣血天使吗？那你为何效力另一支战团？”
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

traits.locale_text: “你不是圣血天使吗？那你为何效力另一支战团？”

languages.text: "Sen bir Kan Meleği'sin, değil mi? Neden farklı bir Tümen'e hizmet ediyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "You are a Blood Angel, aren't you? Why do you serve a different Chapter?"

traits.locale_text: "Sen bir Kan Meleği'sin, değil mi? Neden farklı bir Tümen'e hizmet ediyorsun?"
